text.hastemod.group.throttle.tooltip: Limits how many block-break packets are sent per tick. Lower values are gentler on the server and far less likely to trigger anti-cheat kicks.
text.hastemod.option.shape.tooltip:
How the mod picks which blocks to mine around you.
  Cube   — every block inside the radius cube
  Sphere — every block within radius distance
  Layer  — one Y-layer at your feet, within the radius
  Tunnel — a 3×3 channel in the direction you look
text.hastemod.option.radius.tooltip: How far from you the shape extends (in blocks).
text.hastemod.option.blocks_per_tick.too: Maximum number of block-break attempts per game tick.
text.hastemod.option.tick_delay.tooltip: How many ticks to wait after sending a batch before sending the next one. 20 ticks = 1 second.
